description: Configure a secure workspace for a new receptionist in Nx Witness. Create a custom user role named 'Front Desk Role' with permissions restricted to 'View Live Video' and 'Use Soft Triggers' for the 'Lobby Camera' and 'Entrance Camera' only, ensuring no access to the 'Server Room Camera'. Create a new user 'receptionist' (Name: Alex Reception, Email: alex.r@gymanything.com, Password: Welcome123!) assigned to this role. Configure two soft triggers: 'Unlock Door' on the 'Entrance Camera' (Action: HTTP GET to http://door-controller.local/api/open) and 'Panic Alert' on the 'Lobby Camera' (Action: Create Bookmark with tag 'Security Alert'). Finally, create a shared layout named 'Reception Desk View' containing the 'Lobby Camera' and 'Entrance Camera'.
